title: Paris Underground
writer: Etta Shiber, Boris Ingster, Gertrude Purcell
actors: Constance Bennett, Gracie Fields, Jorge Rigaud
plot: Among the terrified refugees jamming the roads out of Paris in 1940 are Kitty de Mornay, a rich American divorced from her French husband, and her companion Emmeline (Emmy) Quayle. A German patrol orders their car back to Paris an...
